criteriaResults.criterion: Modal renders centered with semi-transparent backdrop overlay
criteriaResults.evidence: Backdrop has fixed inset-0 flex items-center justify-center classes; overlay has bg-black/50; dialog visible and centered

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal has compound components: Modal.Header, Modal.Body, Modal.Footer
criteriaResults.evidence: Header (.border-b with title), Body (.overflow-y-auto with content), Footer (.border-t with 2 buttons) all present and visible

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal.Header includes close button (X) in corner
criteriaResults.evidence: button[aria-label='Close'] with SVG icon found in header section
Modal remains visible after clicking backdrop. The absolute inset-0 overlay div intercepts clicks, making e.target !== e.currentTarget always true in handleBackdropClick
Dialog becomes not visible within 400ms of pressing Escape

criteriaResults.criterion: Focus is trapped inside modal when open
criteriaResults.evidence: After tabbing through all focusable elements + 1, activeElement.closest('[role=dialog]') returns true
animate-fade-in on open, animate-fade-out on close; modal-scale-in/out; Tailwind config defines 200ms durations

criteriaResults.criterion: Modal body scrolls if content overflows viewport
criteriaResults.evidence: Body has overflow-y-auto and max-h-[calc(100vh-200px)] classes

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast component appears in bottom-right corner of viewport
criteriaResults.evidence: Container has fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-[100] classes

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast shows message, type icon (success=green, error=red, info=blue)
criteriaResults.evidence: Success: text-green-500 icon + border-l-green-500; Error: text-red-500 + border-l-red-500; Info: text-blue-500 + border-l-blue-500

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast has close button (X) for manual dismiss
criteriaResults.evidence: button[aria-label='Close'] present in toast, clicking it removes the toast
Toast disappears after 3.5s wait; ToastContext uses setTimeout(removeToast, 3000)

criteriaResults.criterion: Multiple toasts stack vertically with newest at bottom
criteriaResults.evidence: 3 toasts rendered; container uses flex flex-col gap-3; newest toast has higher Y position

criteriaResults.criterion: Toast has enter animation (slide up) and exit animation (fade out)
criteriaResults.evidence: Enter: animate-slide-up (300ms); Exit: animate-fade-out (200ms) triggered at 2700ms

criteriaResults.criterion: Both components render via React Portal to document.body
criteriaResults.evidence: Modal presentation parent is document.body; Toast container parent is document.body; both use createPortal
Zero console errors or page errors on /components page load

issues.title: Modal backdrop click does not close modal
issues.expected: Clicking the semi-transparent overlay outside the modal dialog should close the modal
issues.actual: Modal remains open because the absolute inset-0 overlay div intercepts all clicks, causing e.target !== e.currentTarget in handleBackdropClick
issues.evidence: Playwright test: isStillVisible === true after clicking backdrop at coordinates above the dialog. Fix: add pointer-events-none to overlay div.

handoff.handoffNotes: Created defect subtask 5.1 to fix Modal backdrop click. The overlay div (absolute inset-0 bg-black/50) needs pointer-events-none so clicks pass through to the presentation parent div, allowing handleBackdropClick to work correctly.
